# Winning the Race Against AI-Driven Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Hear from an expert cybersecurity panel on how new generative AI techniques have overrun the biometrics revolution by making voice and video deepfakes commonplace. The panel discusses how we can pull ahead and win the race against online fraud. Loren Russon of Ping Identity, Kevin Lee of Sift, and Eve Maler of Venn Factory lead this panel on the new security landscape and how digital identity will evolve.

### Watch the On-Demand Webinar

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
